Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.CourseParticipantSettings

Settings for the course participant page

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CourseProfiles

The course profiles available in the course.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.CourseProfile

None.
DefaultCourseProfileId

The default course profile identifier. This is the setting is fetched from the course profiles.

 integer

None.
InstantMessageMaxPersonsPerThread

The max number of Instant Message recipients it is allowed to send to

 integer

None.
ShowApplicantTab

Indicates wether the Applicants Tab should be shown to relevant users.

 boolean

None.
FirstNameFirst

Culture for Nameformatting

 boolean

None.
ExtraInformationTitle

Extra Information column

 string

None.
FunctionalityMessages

Is messages functionality enabled

 boolean

None.
CurrentPersonId

The logged in user person id

 integer

None.
TemporaryAccessToCourses

Is temporary access to courses enabled

 boolean

None.
